title: Superhuman acquires AI detection startup GPTZero
slides: What does Superhuman want with GPTZero?
GPTZero scans text for AI fingerprints.
Superhuman isn’t just buying a detection tool.
Your inbox may soon flag AI-written replies.
Test your own drafts against this new layer.
thread_text:
1. Why buy the detector?

Superhuman is in talks to acquire GPTZero for an eight-figure sum.

2. AI writing leaves traces.

GPTZero scans each reply for the statistical patterns LLMs leave behind.

3. This isn’t a filter.

Superhuman plans to embed GPTZero into the compose window, not just the inbox.

4. Your replies get flagged.

A future update may surface a warning when your draft reads like AI wrote it.

5. Run your own test today.

Copy a reply you wrote yourself into GPTZero’s public demo. Does it pass as human?
video_script: They will flag your outgoing drafts.
It sits inside the compose window.
Test a draft on GPTZero today.

instagram.caption:
Superhuman is buying AI detection startup GPTZero for an eight-figure sum.

GPTZero scans text for the statistical patterns LLMs leave behind.

Superhuman will embed it into the compose window—so your drafts get flagged as AI-written before you hit send.

Your own replies may soon surface a warning that reads like AI wrote them.

Copy a draft you actually wrote into GPTZero’s public demo today—does it pass as human?

carousel_slides.hook: Your AI replies will be flagged.
carousel_slides.description: Superhuman plans to embed GPTZero into the compose window to scan replies before sending.
GPTZero detects the patterns LLMs leave behind, scanning every reply for telltale signals.

carousel_slides.hook: Not just a filter—an embedded layer.
carousel_slides.description: Superhuman is buying GPTZero to embed detection inside the compose window, not just the inbox.
When your draft reads like AI wrote it, a warning may appear before you hit send.
